assertions.text: Enters audit mode (not integration or debug)
assertions.evidence: Explicitly states 'Mode Detected: Audit (trigger: understand where CleverTap is being used across our codebase)'.
Step 2 says 'Read the audit reference -- load core/audit/features.md for Android-specific method signatures, regex search patterns, ordering rules, and the report template.'

assertions.text: Searches for onUserLogin calls across the codebase
assertions.evidence: IDENTITY_ALL pattern includes 'onUserLogin' with detailed grouping strategy for multi-login flows (email, Google SSO, Facebook).
PUSH_ALL pattern includes 'pushFcmRegistrationId' with dedicated sub-search table breaking it into token registration, handler, channel, permission, and click handler.

assertions.text: Groups findings by feature area in the report
assertions.evidence: Section 5 mapping table groups into 10 categories: Initialization, Identity, Events, Push Notifications, App Inbox, In-App, Web Push, Product Experiences, Geofencing, Native Display. Full report template in Section 6.

Section 7.1 Multi-Login Flow Identity Analysis asks 'Is onUserLogin called in ALL three login flows, or only some?' with per-flow breakdown table. Report template includes example: 'Facebook login flow does not pass Email key.'
